leadershipTeam.name: John Masterson
leadershipTeam.bio: One of the original AG Grid team in 2016, John has over 20 years' of experience across software development, product management, commercial strategy, and executive management. He has a strong track record of scaling developer-focused businesses and leading high-performing teams in fast-growing SaaS and enterprise software environments. As CEO of AG Grid, John is responsible for defining the company's strategic direction, driving innovation, and supporting long-term, sustainable growth. He works closely with customers and the leadership team to ensure AG Grid remains the trusted standard for enterprise-grade JavaScript development products.

leadershipTeam.name: Rob Clarke
leadershipTeam.bio: Rob is a technology leader with more than 20 years' experience transforming engineering teams and driving product innovation. He has led initiatives in telecommunications, financial services, and enterprise software, joining AG Grid in 2017 after serving as a technical lead and architect at RBS. Rob has since scaled the engineering team and broadened the product portfolio. As CTO, he shapes technical strategy and product development across all products, most recently spearheading the launch of AG Charts Enterprise for enterprise-grade data visualisation.

leadershipTeam.name: Jon Williams
leadershipTeam.bio: Jon has over 25 years' experience leading commercial teams from start-ups to global organisations. Honing his skills at companies such as Aprimo, Boxever, and Sitecore. Jon now brings a wealth of experience delivering go-to-market strategies, business integration, and delivering B2B sales success to AG Grid.

leadershipTeam.name: Jason Forget
leadershipTeam.bio: Jason is a technology executive with deep experience scaling developer-first software companies into global enterprise platforms. He has built and led high-growth go-to-market organizations, transforming product-led adoption into large-scale enterprise revenue engines and helping developer-focused products achieve broad adoption across many of the world’s leading enterprises. Jason will partner closely with the leadership team to accelerate enterprise growth, preserving the developer trust and community momentum while driving long-term success. At AG Grid, he will work with the team to expand enterprise adoption, strengthen strategic customer relationships, and help scale the company’s next phase of growth.

leadershipTeam.name: Jason Osmond
leadershipTeam.bio: Jason is a seasoned technology executive with over 25 years' of experience driving growth, scaling operations, and building high-performing, commercially focused organisations. He brings a strong track record of value creation through strategic leadership, operational discipline, and a focus on sustainable, recurring revenue models. As Non Executive Director, Jason works closely with AG Grid's leadership team to support long-term growth and market expansion.
